mapper.select: select * from students where name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
mapper.insert: insert into students(student_id, name, department, gpa) values(#{student_id},#{name},#{department},#{gpa})
mapper.update: update students set name=#{name}, department=#{department}, gpa=#{gpa} where student_id = #{student_id}
mapper.select: select department as major_name, count(*) as major_count from students group by department
